name: Cheddar & Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven according to your B/M cookbook.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar and yeast with milk.
3. Add butter to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Gradually add bread flour and salt, stirring continuously.
5. Fold in shredded cheddar cheese and cooked, crumbled bacon.
6. Turn off the heat when finished kneading according to your B/M cookbook's instructions.
